first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the justifications and strengths in both evaluations are substantively the same, focusing on the candidate's extensive professional experience. The minor differences in the listed concerns—swapping a note about resume date typos for a note about specific testing frameworks—are not logically connected to the university change and fall within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation.
